---
title: "`jammi_ai` API reference"
---

The recipes call exactly these `jammi_ai` signatures, grounded against the pinned
`jammi_ai==0.26.4` wheel. The reference is maintained as a single source of truth
in the shared library and rendered here; `scripts/check_api_reference.py` fails
CI if the installed wheel's signatures drift from it.

{{< include ../jammi_cookbook/_api_reference.md >}}
